description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image, with a pip cache at .cache/pip and a virtualenv cache at venv/, and define the variable PIP_CACHE_DIR pointing to the pip cache directory. Define a single test stage and include the Security/SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template, which adds a sast job in the test stage. Add a custom job named job1 in the test stage that runs before_script commands: apt-get -qq update, apt-get install -y gdb rsync, python -V, pip install virtualenv, virtualenv venv, and source venv/bin/activate. Then have job1 execute script commands: pip install pytest pytest-cov pycodestyle, python setup.py install, mkdir -p ~/.local/bin, touch ~/.local/bin/afl-fuzz, chmod +x ~/.local/bin/afl-fuzz, export PATH=$PATH:~/.local/bin/, pycodestyle afl_utils afl-collect afl-cron afl-minimize afl-multicore afl-multikill afl-stats afl-sync afl-vcrash, coverage run setup.py test, and coverage report -m, with a coverage regex of /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/. No artifacts or additional rules are defined.
